ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the poll was conducted */,
  "pollster" TEXT /* Name of the polling organization */,
  "num_observations" INTEGER /* Number of observations in the poll */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the poll */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the poll */,
  "obama" INTEGER /* Percentage of support for Obama */,
  "romney" INTEGER /* Percentage of support for Romney */,
  "other" INTEGER /* Percentage of support for other candidates */,
  "undecided" INTEGER /* Percentage of undecided voters */,
  "mode" TEXT /* Method used for polling */,
  "population" TEXT /* Target population of the poll */,
  "poll_title" TEXT /* Descriptive title for the poll */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the poll */,
  "poll_type" TEXT /* Type of poll (e.g., primary, general election) */,
  "poll_status" TEXT /* Current status of the poll (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "survey_url" TEXT /* URL to the online survey if applicable */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the poll */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the poll */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the poll was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the poll was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_pollster FOREIGN KEY ("pollster") REFERENCES pollsters ("pollster_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollsters" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster */,
  "pollster_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling organization */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the pollster */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the polling organization */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the polling organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the polling organization */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the polling organization was founded */,
  "reputation_score" REAL /* A score indicating the organization's reputation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pollster was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the pollster's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state in the U.S. */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-letter code for the state */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the state */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the state was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the state's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Political party affiliation */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the candidate was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the candidate's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poll this result belongs to */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of votes for the candidate in the poll */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the result */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used for the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_results_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each polling method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the polling method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the polling method */,
  "cost_estimate" REAL /* Estimated cost of the polling method */,
  "efficacy_score" REAL /* A score indicating the method's effectiveness */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the method was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the method's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "populations" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population group */,
  "population_name" TEXT /* Name of the population group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the population group */,
  "population_size" INTEGER /* Size of the population group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the population was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the population's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the organization */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department within the organization */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the access event occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each detail entry */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the report this detail belongs to */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poll this detail pertains to */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of findings from the poll */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the polling method used */,
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the population group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the detail was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the detail was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_population_id FOREIGN KEY ("population_id") REFERENCES populations ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_details_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification */,
  "date_sent" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the notification has been read */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was sent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey question */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the poll this survey belongs to */,
  "question" TEXT /* The survey question being asked */,
  "options" TEXT /* Possible options for the survey question */,
  "survey_type" TEXT /* Type of survey (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the survey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the survey was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey this response belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the response */,
  "response" TEXT /* The option selected by the user */,
  "response_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the response was submitted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the response was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the response was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user submitting the feedback */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the feedback message */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., positive, negative, suggestion) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was submitted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the feedback was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)
